description_long: This is a modern two-story bungalow with a flat, multi-tiered brown roof and a clean, geometric facade. The exterior walls are primarily white with large, dark-framed windows that allow ample natural light into the interior. The front features a double garage, a paved driveway, and a landscaped garden with rectangular planters and pink-blossomed trees. The property is elevated on a blocky base, with a retaining wall and a grassy lawn surrounding the structure. The rear and side views reveal additional windows and a continuous band of glass, emphasizing the open, airy design. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, with a focus on horizontal lines and integration with the landscaped environment.
description: A modern two-story bungalow with a flat brown roof, large windows, and landscaped gardens featuring pink-blossomed trees. The design is sleek, geometric, and emphasizes open, airy spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, main entrance, landscaped garden, and pink-blossomed trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, continuous band of windows and the full extent of the landscaped front yard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back lawn, additional windows, and the angular roof structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the driveway, planters, and the arrangement of trees in the garden.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and banded windows
